methods.description: Process for structuring paleoData and chronData using JSON-LD and CSV files to efficiently store and describe metadata and tabular data.

steps.description: LiPD adopts the Linked Data extension of BibJSON to describe publication metadata.
steps.searchable_summary: Use BibJSON to structure publication metadata in JSON-LD format.

steps.description: For the paleoData and chronData components of LiPD, tabular data are stored separately in headerless CSV files.
steps.searchable_summary: Store tabular data in CSV files and reference them in JSON-LD.

steps.description: The description of the paleoData and chronData in the JSON-LD is structured to include metadata about the data columns.
steps.searchable_summary: Structure JSON-LD to include metadata for data columns.

steps.description: Each LiPD data set is packaged using BagIt, which provides a simple format for collecting and validating files for distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: Package LiPD data sets using BagIt for file validation and distribution.

methods.description: Outline of a preliminary metadata standard for paleoclimatology to ensure consistent and rich metadata across datasets.

steps.description: Define base metadata including dataSetName, archiveType, and investigator.
steps.searchable_summary: Define base metadata fields for paleoclimatology datasets.

steps.description: Define geospatial metadata using GeoJSON including coordinates, type, and siteName.
steps.searchable_summary: Define geospatial metadata using GeoJSON format.

steps.description: Define publication metadata using bibJSON including DOI, citation, and pubString.
steps.searchable_summary: Define publication metadata using bibJSON format.

steps.description: Define paleodata metadata including paleoDataTableName, filename, and climate-sensitive variable.
steps.searchable_summary: Define paleodata metadata fields for datasets.

steps.description: Define chronological metadata including chronDataTableName, filename, and chronology column metadata.
steps.searchable_summary: Define chronological metadata fields for datasets.
